welcome.title: ProcureX
welcome.subtitle: A digital procurement workspace for Tanzanian tender creation, bidding, compliance review, awards, contracts, invoices, and durable records.

about.title: About ProcureX
about.subtitle: ProcureX brings buyers, suppliers, evaluators, and administrators into one controlled procurement operating environment.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: Clear data handling for identity, procurement records, documents, audit evidence, and communication workflows.

terms.title: Terms and Conditions
terms.subtitle: Platform rules for lawful tenders, verified organizations, fair bidding, review, communication, and records.

contact.title: Contact ProcureX
contact.subtitle: Reach support for onboarding, verification, tender workflows, compliance questions, and technical help.

guestMarketplace.title: Open Tender Marketplace
guestMarketplace.subtitle: Explore public opportunities before signing in.

register.title: Create Account
register.subtitle: Register one company account that can act as buyer, supplier, or both after verification.

roleSelection.title: Start Registration
roleSelection.subtitle: Select the account path that matches your organization.

identity.title: Identity Verification
identity.subtitle: Verify TRA/BRELA details, ownership, authorized signatories, and organization capabilities.

profile.title: Account Profile
profile.subtitle: Manage verification status, preferred language, documents, and organization capabilities.

launcher.title: ProcureX Apps
launcher.subtitle: Open the tools available to your verified organization.

dashboard.title: Workspace Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Track active tenders, bids, communications, evaluations, awards, deadlines, and records.

tenderPlanning.title: Tender Planning
tenderPlanning.subtitle: Manage APP, SPP, budget confirmation, approvals, planning reports, and Tender/RFQ handoff before award and contract.

procurementGuide.title: Procurement Process Guide
procurementGuide.subtitle: Move from planning and publication to bidding, evaluation, award, contract, payment, and records.

marketplace.title: Tender Marketplace
marketplace.subtitle: Find open tenders, review requirements, save opportunities, and start bids.

createTender.title: Create Tender
createTender.subtitle: Prepare procurement details, commercial items, requirements, milestones, documents, and publication review.

tenderPublication.title: Tender Draft Detail
tenderPublication.subtitle: Review the generated tender package before approval and publication.

tenderDetails.title: Tender Detail
tenderDetails.subtitle: Monitor buyer-side publication, clarifications, bidder interest, evaluation readiness, and records.

tenderDocument.title: Tender Document
tenderDocument.subtitle: Preview structured tender sections and annexes.

supplierTenderDetail.title: Supplier Tender Detail
supplierTenderDetail.subtitle: Inspect requirements, documents, clarification history, and bid readiness.

bidding.title: Bidding Workspace
bidding.subtitle: Prepare technical responses, commercial pricing, attachments, declarations, and sealed submission.

evaluation.title: Bid Evaluation
evaluation.subtitle: Open bids, check eligibility, score criteria, compare financials, and produce recommendations.

awards.title: Awarding and Contracts
awards.subtitle: Track award decisions, notices, negotiations, pre-contract documents, signatures, and contract records.

awardRecommendation.title: Award Recommendation
awardRecommendation.subtitle: Prepare the award decision, approvals, standstill checks, supplier notices, and contract handoff.

contractNegotiation.title: Contract Negotiation
contractNegotiation.subtitle: Review locked award terms, negotiate clauses, upload pre-contract documents, and prepare signatures.

postAward.title: Post-Award Tracking
postAward.subtitle: Track purchase orders, delivery milestones, invoices, payment status, and performance records.

communication.title: Communication Center
communication.subtitle: Manage messages, clarifications, notifications, alerts, and tender-related communication history.

records.title: Records and History
records.subtitle: Search procurement records, audit events, documents, bids, awards, contracts, and financial history.

adminDashboard.title: Admin Dashboard
adminDashboard.subtitle: Oversee platform activity, compliance queues, verification status, exceptions, and audit events.

adminSearch.title: Admin Deep Search
adminSearch.subtitle: Search tenders, bids, users, documents, audit evidence, evaluations, and compliance cases.

adminUsers.title: User Management
adminUsers.subtitle: Review accounts, organization profiles, capabilities, verification status, and access metadata.

adminCompliance.title: Compliance Rules
adminCompliance.subtitle: Maintain method thresholds, review rules, checklists, escalation paths, and exception queues.

adminAnalytics.title: Platform Analytics
adminAnalytics.subtitle: Analyze procurement value, participation, cycle times, compliance trends, and category distribution.

adminAudit.title: Full Audit Trail
adminAudit.subtitle: Inspect system-wide actions, actors, entities, timestamps, severity, and evidence references.

hero.title: Buy. Supply. Connect. Grow.
hero.body: ProcureX is a modern e-procurement marketplace built to make procurement simple, fair, secure, and accessible for everyone.
hero.support: Create tenders, discover tenders, and build a procurement record today.

preview.title: ProcureX Marketplace
preview.photoAlt: Procurement team reviewing documents in a meeting

sections.gatewayBody: ProcureX connects businesses, procuring entities, and tenderers in one secure, digital-first marketplace.
sections.marketBody: ProcureX creates a shared space where businesses can meet and work together efficiently, whether they are procuring entities, tenderers, or specialized professionals.

steps.title: Create Tender
steps.text: Post goods, services, or consultancy needs to your registered participants.

steps.title: Discover Tenders
steps.text: Browse active procurement requests and find the perfect match for your business capabilities.

steps.title: Submit Bid
steps.text: Prepare and submit professional proposals through our secure and transparent bidding engine.

steps.title: Track Records
steps.text: Maintain a clear audit trail of all messages, clarifications, awards, and historical data.

gateway.imageAlt: Procurement documents prepared for review and signing
gateway.captionText: Centralize your entire procurement workflow. From initial RFP to final contract awarding, keep all data in a single source of truth.

assurance.title: No scattered communication
assurance.text: Messages, clarification requests, and alerts stay in the system so critical data is never lost in email threads.

assurance.title: No hidden tenders
assurance.text: Discover open tenders and service needs in one organized place, ensuring fair competition for all verified partners.

marketCards.title: Tenders
marketCards.text: Access a global stream of verified procurement requests that match your specific industry and scale.

marketCards.title: Relationships
marketCards.text: Build long-term partnerships through our transparent profile and performance tracking system.

marketCards.title: Records
marketCards.text: Maintain a robust, immutable record of every transaction, bid, and contract for compliance and audit.

cta.title: Join ProcureX today.
cta.body: Start your procurement journey with one simple account. Create tenders, submit bids, and grow your business today.

footer.copyright: 2026 ProcureX. All rights reserved. Connecting businesses, tenderers, and professionals through smarter procurement.

alerts.networkUnavailable: The authentication service is not available. Check your connection and try again.
alerts.serverUnavailable: The authentication service is not available. Please try again later.
alerts.rateLimitWait: Please wait before requesting another code.
alerts.rateLimit: Too many attempts. Please wait and try again.
alerts.securityFailed: Security check failed or expired. Complete the security check and try again.
alerts.sessionInvalid: Your session is invalid or expired. Please sign in again.
alerts.requestExpired: This request has expired. Start again and try once more.
alerts.deliveryUnavailable: Delivery is not available right now. Please try again later.
alerts.actionUnavailable: This account action is not available with the current information.
alerts.authActionNotFound: The requested auth action was not found.

delivery.smsUnavailable: SMS verification is not available right now. Please try again later.
delivery.activationUnavailable: Email activation is not available right now. Please try again later.
delivery.resetUnavailable: Password reset email is not available right now. Please try again later.

expired.otp: That verification code has expired. Request a new code and try again.
expired.activation: That activation code has expired. Request a new activation email and try again.
expired.reset: That reset code has expired. Request a new reset code and try again.

conflict.phone: An account already exists for this phone number.
conflict.email: An account already exists for this email.
conflict.passwordGate: Verify your phone and email before creating a password.

notFound.registration: Account information was not found. Start registration again.
notFound.otp: Verification request was not found. Request a new code.
notFound.activation: Activation request was not found. Request a new activation email.
notFound.reset: Password reset request was not found. Request a new reset code.

badInput.phone: Enter a valid phone number in international format.
badInput.password: Enter a stronger password that meets all requirements.

fallback.signIn: Sign-in failed. Check the email and password.

security.missing: Complete the security check before continuing.
security.missingSignIn: Complete the security check before signing in.

register.headerSignIn: Already have an account? Sign in

account.title: Join Us
account.subtitle: Create an account
account.emailHint: Your sign-in email and activation address.

activation.title: Activate Your Email
activation.subtitle: An activation code was sent to
activation.sentBody: Your account is activated after email confirmation, then you can create your password.
activation.label: Activation Code *

password.title: Create Your Password
password.subtitle: This password is required on the sign-in screen.
password.label: Password *

success.title: Account Created
success.body: Your login credentials are ready. Sign in to continue with identity verification.
success.nextBody: After sign-in, new users complete identity verification before entering the platform.

messages.otpResent: A new verification code has been sent.
messages.activationResent: A new activation email has been sent.
messages.passwordRequirements: Complete all password requirements and confirm agreement.

signIn.title: Welcome Back
signIn.subtitle: Sign in

demo.title: Demo account
demo.body: Use the seeded verified user for local walkthroughs.

signIn.note: Your account opens the workspace allowed by its verification status.

request.title: Reset Password
request.subtitle: Enter your account email to receive reset instructions.

reset.title: Create New Password
reset.subtitle: Enter the reset code from your email and choose a new password.

complete.title: Password Updated
complete.body: You can now sign in with your new password.

messages.resetRequested: If an account exists for this email, password reset instructions have been sent.
messages.resetResent: If the reset request is still active, a new reset code has been sent.
messages.missingCode: Open the reset link from your email or enter the reset code provided to you.
messages.passwordRequirements: Complete all password requirements and confirm both passwords match.
